faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started.

items.q: What is TED and why should I monitor it?
items.a: TED (Tenders Electronic Daily) is the EU's official procurement journal. Over 250,000 public contracts worth billions of euros are published there every year. If you sell to governments or large organizations in Europe, monitoring TED is essential to finding new business.

items.q: How does the CPV matching work?
items.a: CPV (Common Procurement Vocabulary) codes classify what a tender is about. You tell us which codes match your business — for example, 72000000 for IT services. Our system scans every new TED notice and filters by your codes, so you only see relevant opportunities.

Our algorithm analyzes each tender against your profile — considering factors like contract value, location, required qualifications, and competition level — and assigns a 0–100% score indicating how likely you are to win. This helps you focus on the best opportunities.

items.q: Can I try TenderWatch before paying?
items.a: Absolutely. Every plan comes with a 14-day free trial. No credit card required. You get full access to all features during the trial, so you can evaluate whether TenderWatch is right for your business.

items.q: How is this different from just checking TED directly?
items.a: TED publishes thousands of notices daily across all EU languages. Manually filtering them is a full-time job. TenderWatch automates the entire process — matching, scoring, summarizing, and alerting — so your team can focus on writing winning proposals instead of searching.

items.q: Can I cancel or change my plan anytime?
items.a: Yes. There are no long-term contracts. You can upgrade, downgrade, or cancel your subscription at any time. If you cancel, you keep access until the end of your current billing period.

bau.heroHeadline: EU Construction Tenders — New Opportunities Daily
bau.heroSubheadline: Never miss a construction contract again. TenderWatch scans all EU procurement platforms daily and delivers matching construction tenders — automatically filtered by CPV 45xxxxxx.

benefits.title: Specialized Construction Filters
benefits.desc: Our CPV matching identifies all relevant construction tenders — from building to civil engineering to renovation. You only see what fits your business.

benefits.title: Deadline Tracking
benefits.desc: Construction projects have tight submission deadlines. TenderWatch automatically notifies you 7, 3, and 1 day before expiry — so you never miss a deadline.

benefits.title: Competition Analysis
benefits.desc: Learn how many bidders applied for similar construction contracts and get a realistic assessment of your winning chances.

benefits.title: Project Value Filters
benefits.desc: Filter by contract volume — whether small renovation projects under €100k or major projects over €10M. Tailor your search to your company profile.

benefits.title: Regional Coverage
benefits.desc: Construction tenders from all 27 EU member states. Filter by country, region, or virtually any location for your projects.
